rulings.Case Title: WARREN HAASE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, February 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANTs FDCC CALIFORNIA, INC. and MONTEREY MECHANICAL COMPANY, SCOTT CO. OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is taken off calendar per request of moving party. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CARL WAGNER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, February 1, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Albert D. Seeno Construction Co., Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production as it relies solely on plaintiff's deposition testimony and did not provide any responses by plaintiffs' to contention interrogatories on the subject of causation. =(220/HEK)
